features: Beautifully wrapped and ready to pop under the tree, indulge in all your pamper essentials
Contains 100ml bath bubbles, 100ml body spritz and 50ml body lotion
Baylis & Harding's iconic Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit fragrance
description: Product Description Delight your senses or treat a loved one to the ultimate gift set including 100ml bath bubbles, 100ml body spritz and 50ml body lotion, perfectly packaged and ready for gifting! Art deco design meets timeless luxury with our enduring Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit collection. Our most iconic fragrance, composed with beautiful jasmine and layered with sparkling citrus top notes brings a luxe dimension to this classic assortment. An elegant monochrome palette coupled with a geometric print masterfully accented with gold foil accents, perfectly finesses this seasonal collection. Timeless, always understated and elegant; Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit is our most iconic and best-selling fragrance. Enduring in its appeal, its subtle fragrance, a blend of jasmine and orange with sparkling top notes of sweet mandarin, grapefruit and lemon. Ingredients BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 16035 (Red 40).BODY SPRITZ: Aqua (Water, Eau), Alcohol Denat., Polysorbate 60, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum (Fragrance), Benzophenone-4, Ethylhexylglycerin, Aminomethyl Propanol, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil Oil Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pinene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes.BODY LOTION: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Citral, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil Oil, Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pinene, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. Directions Body Spritz - Spray Onto Your Body As Required. Body Lotion - Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Bath Bubbles - Pour Into Bath Under Warm Running Water. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
